name: Elixirr International plc
summary: Elixirr International plc, through its subsidiaries, provides management consultancy services in the United Kingdom, the United States, and internationally. The company offers its services for various industries, such as financial services, insurance, retail and consumer goods, luxury and fashion, media, technology and entertainment, life sciences, manufacturing, automotive, resources, and business services. Elixirr International plc was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
